ast.target: 选择或拖放音频文件以启用转录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Complete authentication in your browser. This window will update automatically.
ast.target: 请在您的浏览器中完成身份验证。此窗口将自动更新。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Automatic callback couldn't connect. Paste the redirect URL or authorization code from your browser below.
ast.target: 自动回调无法连接。请在下方粘贴来自浏览器的重定向 URL 或授权码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save an API key to replace the stored subscription login, or disconnect it from the row above.
ast.target: 保存 API 密钥以替换存储的订阅登录，或从上方行断开连接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: You can always change transcription output format and modal behavior here.
ast.target: 提示：您可以随时在此处更改转录输出格式和模态行为。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a name for the new manual backup:
ast.target: 输入新手动备份的名称：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Import and sync highlights, books, articles, and annotations from Readwise into your vault.
ast.target: 将 Readwise 中的高亮、书籍、文章和注释导入并同步到您的库中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Jump straight to any setting, section, or integration.
ast.target: 直接跳转到任何设置、部分或集成。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search titles, descriptions, and section anchors.
ast.target: 搜索标题、描述和部分锚点。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This preview is truncated. The file is too large to preview completely.
ast.target: 此预览已截断。文件过大，无法完整预览。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Files will be processed in batches of 3 and stop on the first error
ast.target: 文件将按每批3个进行处理，并在第一个错误时停止

ast.name: text
ast.source: Skip All will mark these files as skipped so they do not auto-process. Clear skips in Settings -> Workflow.
ast.target: “全部跳过”将把这些文件标记为已跳过，以便它们不会自动处理。在“设置 -> 工作流”中清除跳过状态。
